entities.name: NATURAL AND ARTIFICIAL SELECTION
entities.description: Processes used to combine favourable alleles for desirable traits in crop species

entities.name: FAVOURABLE ALLELES
entities.description: Specific versions of genes that contribute to desirable characteristics

entities.name: DESIRABLE TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics in crops that are beneficial for agriculture or consumers

entities.name: CROP SPECIES
entities.description: Plants grown for food, fiber, or other agricultural purposes

entities.name: MODERN PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Contemporary techniques used to improve crop yields and traits

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Planned approaches to introduce genetic variation and improve crops

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic information among individuals within a population

entities.name: YIELD GAPS
entities.description: The difference between potential crop yield and actual yield

entities.name: EPIGENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Heritable changes in gene expression that do not involve changes to the underlying DNA sequence

entities.name: CIS-REGULATORY VARIATION
entities.description: Variation in the non-coding DNA sequences that regulate the expression of nearby genes

entities.name: PLANT TRAITS
entities.description: Observable characteristics of plants resulting from genetic and environmental factors

entities.name: NON-GENIC VARIATION
entities.description: Variation that does not occur in the protein-coding sequences of genes, including epigenetic and cis-regulatory changes

entities.name: SYNTHETIC BIOLOGY
entities.description: The design and construction of new biological parts, devices, and systems

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY APPLICATIONS
entities.description: The use of biological systems or living organisms to develop or make products
